/repo-assist Run Task 5 (Coding Improvements) for the area described below. Be highly selective — only a clearly beneficial, low-risk change. Fresh branch, build and test, then open a draft PR with rationale and a Test Status section.

Keep the /repo-assist line as the FIRST line of this issue — that is what triggers command mode.
Only owners/members/collaborators can trigger it.
-->

-

**What "better" looks like (optional):** clarity, dead-code removal, reduced duplication, docs gaps…
